name: Copy of VIX Mid-Term Futures: SPY RSI predicts VIX (3 tickers)
description: I wanted to create a very simple strategy that earns from VIX. I use mid-term volatility ETFs to reduce variability the size of movements. SPY RSI predicts whether to short or go long VIX Mid-Term Futures ETPs. Additionally, since this uses a fairly unpopular set of ETPs, it doesn't conflict with many other symphonies for wash sales, etc. To back test further, use SVXY instead of ZVOL. Future improvements research could include SVIX and UVIX.
